extract: Great Tusk (Japanese: イダイナキバ Idainakiba) is a dual-type Ground/Fighting Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Great Tusk is said to be either an ancient relative of Donphan or a version of it from a parallel timeline. It also has a futuristic counterpart, Iron Treads.
